---
title: "Home"
format: html
---

<div class="landing-wrap">

  <div class="status-pill">Analyzing Data...</div>

  <section class="hero-screen">
    <div class="hero-copy">
      <h1 class="hero-mega">
        The Sound of <span>Resonance.</span>
      </h1>

      <p class="hero-lead">
        Video game music evolved from technical hardware loops into larger,
        more varied soundtrack structures. This project examines how
        soundtrack scale changed across technological eras through historical
        context, listening examples, and exploratory data analysis.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="overview-panel">
    <div class="overview-card">
      <h3>Research Question</h3>
      <p>
        How has the scale of video game soundtracks changed across technological eras?
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="overview-grid">
      <div class="scope-card">
        <h4>Historical Timeline</h4>
        <p>Interactive context for major shifts in game music history.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="scope-card">
        <h4>Dataset</h4>
        <p>A manually constructed soundtrack dataset across multiple eras.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="scope-card">
        <h4>Analysis</h4>
        <p>Track counts, runtime, and structural soundtrack comparisons.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="scope-card">
        <h4>Listening</h4>
        <p>Embedded examples that let users hear musical change directly.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="timeline-section">
    <h2>History of Video Game Music</h2>
    <p class="section-intro">
      The timeline below highlights key moments in the evolution of video game music,
      from early electronic loops to modern cinematic scoring.
    </p>

    <iframe src='https://cdn.knightlab.com/libs/timeline3/latest/embed/index.html?source=v2%3A2PACX-1vSriMzVf35i-a6C6ICckzYUZZ7CMFI9_KO1pHxIlgXtCi2f-7xcDrE-UWyzM-jGd3z7d8O3ND4ysOlg&font=Default&lang=en&initial_zoom=2&width=100%25&height=650'
    width='100%'
    height='750'
    webkitallowfullscreen
    mozallowfullscreen
    allowfullscreen
    frameborder='0'></iframe>
  </section>

</div>
